title: PM Lane 412 - Project Miner Temp Power Lane 278 Sibling Import Contract Support No-Live Design Packet
authority_basis: Lane 352 return-label classification as OUTPUT_WRITE_REQUEST_SEPARATE_ADMISSION_REQUIRED plus standing PM coordination authority for no-live design authoring only.

source_floor.core_import_lane: PM Lane 278 - Project Miner Temp Power Approved Import Mutation Admission
source_floor.meaning: PM Lane 278 remains historically closed as the bounded core import lane. Additional contract-support persistence is treated as a separate sibling admission question.

source_classification.source_lane: PM Lane 352 - Project Miner Temp Power Remaining Finance And Source Rule Question Card No-Live Packet
source_classification.reason: The extractor would create additional persistent support rows and apparatus quote fields beyond the already-admitted Lane 278 import surface.

branching_decision.reason: Scope-pool allocation, project snapshoting, and apparatus quoted revenue are import-side prerequisites and should not be introduced by the later Complete-status mutation branch.

preconditions: PM Lane 278 import-status readback reports classification=imported
allowed_future_writes: the required seam.scope_labor_details rows for the four estimator pools after scope allocation
not_allowed: No billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or customer billing delivery.
No source workbook writeback or workbook macros.
No Render, Vercel, Olares, auth, ingress, DNS, or secret changes.

multi_scope_rule.fixture_requirement: Include an explicit multi-scope fixture so single-scope Miner data cannot mask normalization defects.

required_no_go_checks: sum of scope-level pool amounts equals project snapshot contract_value
sum of apparatus quoted_revenue reconciles to project snapshot contract_value within rounding tolerance
multi-scope fixture proves allocation beyond the single-scope Miner case

readback_contract.downstream_gate: Later Lane 280 or Lane 411 live implementation must require classification=ready before any status-triggered revenue behavior is allowed.

validation_steps: Decision-label search across touched Lane 412 files
Selected-outcome search across touched Lane 412 files
Branching-decision search for retroactive Lane 278 rejection and Lane 280 decoupling
Future route and readback route search
No revenue-event and no status-mutation boundary search
git diff --check on touched Lane 412 files
